benefits.description: Light brown spots and freckles darkened significantly; tanning effect even with minimal UV exposure

side_effects.description: Light brown spots become very dark, new freckles appear; tiny dark brown/black spots appeared on back without sun exposure

protocol_notes: At 200 lbs, recommended dosage cited as 2mg. Suggests starting at 0.5mg. Notes no libido changes but possible spontaneous erections. Also mentions Melanotan 1 as a less potent alternative with potentially less side effects and uneven darkening. Advises against mixing with Cialis due to 36-hour effect; prefers low-dose Viagra instead.
